# Lawang Estate

> Curated tropical real estate in Bali and Sumba, Indonesia. Hand-picked villas, land and signature estates for international buyers and investors. Bilingual service (English / Indonesian).

## Key facts
- Focus: curated tropical properties in Bali and Sumba, Indonesia
- Offering: villas, land plots and signature estate listings
- Audience: international buyers and investors
- Website: https://lawang.id

## Sections
- [Portfolio](https://lawang.id/portfolio.html): the full collection of available properties.
- [Signature](https://lawang.id/signature.html): the flagship / primary estate listings.
